title: geum flavum
intro: Geum flavum, also known as the yellow avens, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geum flavum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Geum flavum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin issues and wounds.
